markdown.text:
Machines help us do our work easily. Machines are made by people. # FEATURES OF A MACHINE
Machines help us in many ways. Machines make our work easy. Machines save our time. Machines help us do our work faster. Machines cannot work on their own. ##### Some machines run on fuel.
Car
Motorbike
##### Some machines run on electricity.
Aeroplane Mixer
Washing Machine
Refrigerator #### Some machines need human power to work.
Bicycle
Boat
Handcart

##### WISDOM BOX ATM is also a type of computer. We can withdraw and deposit money using this machine. ##### BENEFITS OF A COMPUTER
• It does not make mistakes. We can do our work faster. • It saves our time. • It can do different types of work. Computer is helpful in many ways.
• It can connect us to any place in the world.
